name: System
description: Master boot controller for the ROOT_SYSTEM

scripts.boot:mac: node auto-ip.js && (pkill -f 'python main.py' || true) && (pkill -f 'mkdocs serve' || true) && (pkill -f 'expo start' || true) && sleep 2 && concurrently -c "green,blue,yellow" -n "BACKEND,FRONTEND,DOCS" "cd System-Backend && python main.py" "cd System-Frontend && npm start -- --tunnel --port 8082 --clear" "mkdocs serve --dev-addr 0.0.0.0:8001"
scripts.boot:win: node auto-ip.js && concurrently -c "green,blue,yellow" -n "BACKEND,FRONTEND,DOCS" "cd System-Backend && venv\Scripts\activate && python main.py" "cd System-Frontend && npx expo start" "mkdocs serve --dev-addr 0.0.0.0:8001"
scripts.boot:simple: node auto-ip.js && concurrently -c "green,blue,yellow" -n "BACKEND,FRONTEND,DOCS" "cd System-Backend && python main.py" "cd System-Frontend && npx expo start" "mkdocs serve --dev-addr 0.0.0.0:8001"
